reviews.review_title: Great example of immersion for empathy
reviews.review_description:
I found this 3 minute demo drew out more empathy and a basis for further thought and understanding than half a day of traditional training on bias.  I found this even better than when effective role play is used in training (and you get paired with someone who takes the role play seriously, which is rare). 

I really like this and will be looking at your web site more, talking with my company’s D&I, XR, and training groups for consideration in our internal Quest app tool.
